scope: v0.3.1 minimum viable — known fabricated sub-articles + deprecated articles. Statutes / articles NOT listed here pass through self_grade.py SRC-04 format check only (avoiding false positives for less common statutes). Comprehensive whitelist deferred to Phase 1.7+ when verified article-number enumeration per statute is feasible.

民法 §11-1.correct_alternative: 民法 §11 (人之權利能力始於出生終於死亡); no sub-article §11-1 in 民法.

營業秘密法 §11-1.correct_alternative: 營業秘密法 §11 (排除及防止侵害請求權); the article that grants injunctive-relief / 禁制令 functionality is §11 itself, not §11-1.
營業秘密法 §11-1.trap_source: v0.3.0 dogfood NDA audit 2026-05-12 (toolkit cited '§11 之 1 禁制令')

個人資料保護法 §27.correct_alternative: 個人資料保護法 §20-1 (非公務機關安全維護義務 — substantive duty preserved at renumbered article).
個人資料保護法 §27.trap_source: v0.3.0 dogfood NDA audit 2026-05-12; verified at https://law.moj.gov.tw

個資法 §27.trap_source: same as 個人資料保護法 §27

applicability_notes.民法 §247-1: Applies ONLY to 定型化契約 (standard-form / adhesion contracts used repeatedly with the same wording). Citing §247-1 against a 1-on-1 negotiated B2B contract is doctrinally weak — record applicability_caveat in citation.
applicability_notes.公平交易法 §25: Requires market-impact element (顯失公平 must affect 交易秩序). Single bilateral clause without market-impact framing has weak §25 traction.
applicability_notes.民法 §110: Protects bona-fide THIRD PARTY against unauthorised agent. NOT a basis for the principal seeking reimbursement from its agent — cite §107 + 不當得利 §179 for that chain.
applicability_notes.營業秘密法 §13-1: CRIMINAL liability article (1-5 years' imprisonment + fine for intentional misappropriation for unlawful gain). For CIVIL survival-after-termination, cite §§2, 10, 11 — not §13-1.
applicability_notes.民事訴訟法 §6: Special-jurisdiction rule for legal entities (法人住所地). Default applicable but does not auto-override agreed-jurisdiction clauses.
